module_info.docstring: Shared utility classes and functions for Darwinian Evolver command line scripts.

functions.name: register_hyperparameter_args
functions.docstring: Register hyperparameter arguments for the given argument parser.

functions.name: parse_midpoint_score
functions.docstring:
Parse midpoint score argument.

Returns (fixed_score, percentile) where exactly one is None

functions.name: build_hyperparameter_config_from_args
functions.docstring: Build a HyperparameterConfig from the command line arguments.

functions.name: parse_learning_log_view_type
functions.docstring:
Parse learning log view type from string.

Returns the class of the LearningLogView and any additional keyword parameters as a dictionary that need
to be passed to the constructor.
